info.title: Explore project structure and find keyboard/codeblock related files (@explore subagent)

parts.text:
Explore this project thoroughly to understand the codebase structure and find all files related to:
1. The in-app keyboard (virtual keyboard, custom keyboard component)
2. Codeblock components
3. Input handling, focus management, and event handling between keyboard and code blocks
4. Any state management related to keyboard input

Start by reading the top-level directory structure, package.json, and then dig into src/ or similar directories. Look for keywords like "keyboard", "codeblock", "code-block", "CodeBlock", "Keyboard", "input", "onPress", "onKey", "editor", "textarea" etc.

Return:
- The overall project structure (key directories and their purpose)
- All files that are related to the keyboard component
- All files that are related to codeblock/code editor components
- Any shared state or context files that connect these two
- Key code snippets showing how keyboard input is supposed to be sent to codeblocks
- Any obvious issues you can spot

<path>/workspaces/learn-p5/src/components/ProgrammingKeyboard.tsx</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
2: import { View, Text, Pressable, ScrollView, Modal, StyleSheet, Animated } from "react-native";
3: import { MaterialCommunityIcons } from "@expo/vector-icons";
4: import { useThemeContext } from "./ThemeProvider";
5: import { Colors } from "../constants/Colors";
6: import { Spacing } from "../constants/Spacing";
7: import { Typography } from "../constants/Typography";
8: import { P5_SYMBOLS } from "../data/reference";
9: import { p5Functions, p5FunctionLabels, pairedSymbols, singleSymbols, P5FunctionDef, PairedSymbol } from "../data/keyboardLayout";
10: 
11: interface ProgrammingKeyboardProps {
12:  onInsert: (text: string, cursorOffset?: number) => void;
13:  exerciseSymbols?: string[];
14:  onToggleKeyboard?: () => void;
15:  onToggleQwerty?: () => void;
16:  onBackspace?: () => void;
17:  onNewline?: () => void;
18:  onFormat?: () => void;
19:  onOpenReference?: (symbol: string) => void;
20:  keyboardVisible?: boolean;
21:  usedFunctions?: string[];
22:  height?: number;
23: }
24: 
25: const BACKSPACE_DELAY = 300;
26: const BACKSPACE_INTERVAL = 60;
27: 
28: export default function ProgrammingKeyboard({ onInsert, exerciseSymbols = [], onToggleKeyboard, onToggleQwerty, onBackspace, onNewline, onFormat, onOpenReference, keyboardVisible = true, usedFunctions = [], height = 280 }: ProgrammingKeyboardProps) {
29:  const { colorScheme, derivedColors } = useThemeContext();
30:  const colors = Colors[colorScheme === "dark" ? "dark" : "light"];
31:  const [hintType, setHintType] = useState<"string" | "array" | null>(null);
32:  const [popupSymbol, setPopupSymbol] = useState<string | null>(null);
33:  const popupAnim = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current;
34:  const backspaceTimer = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);
35:  const backspaceInterval = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null);
36:  const onBackspaceRef = useRef(onBackspace);
37:  onBackspaceRef.current = onBackspace;
38: 
39:  useEffect(() => {
40:  return () => {
41:  if (backspaceTimer.current) clearTimeout(backspaceTimer.current);
42:  if (backspaceInterval.current) clearInterval(backspaceInterval.current);
43:  };
44:  }, []);
45: 
46:  useEffect(() => {
47:  if (popupSymbol) {
48:  popupAnim.setValue(0);
49:  Animated.timing(popupAnim, {
50:  toValue: 1,
51:  duration: 120,
52:  useNativeDriver: true,
53:  }).start();
54:  }
55:  }, [popupSymbol, popupAnim]);
56: 
57:  const clearBackspaceRepeat = useCallback(() => {
58:  if (backspaceTimer.current) {
59:  clearTimeout(backspaceTimer.current);
60:  backspaceTimer.current = null;
61:  }
62:  if (backspaceInterval.current) {
63:  clearInterval(backspaceInterval.current);
64:  backspaceInterval.current = null;
65:  }
66:  }, []);
67: 
68:  const startBackspaceRepeat = useCallback(() => {
69:  if (!onBackspaceRef.current) return;
70:  onBackspaceRef.current();
71:  backspaceTimer.current = setTimeout(() => {
72:  backspaceInterval.current = setInterval(() => {
73:  onBackspaceRef.current?.();
74:  }, BACKSPACE_INTERVAL);
75:  }, BACKSPACE_DELAY);
76:  }, []);
77: 
78:  const handleFunctionPress = useCallback((fn: P5FunctionDef) => {
79:  const parenIndex = fn.insert.indexOf("()");
80:  const cursorOffset = parenIndex >= 0 ? parenIndex + 1 : undefined;
81:  onInsert(fn.insert, cursorOffset);
82:  const hasString = fn.paramTypes.some((p) => p === "string");
83:  const hasArray = fn.paramTypes.some((p) => p === "array");
84:  if (hasString) {
85:  setHintType("string");
86:  } else if (hasArray) {
87:  setHintType("array");
88:  } else {
89:  setHintType(null);
90:  }
91:  }, [onInsert]);
92: 
93:  const handleSinglePress = useCallback((sym: string) => {
94:  setHintType(null);
95:  onInsert(sym);
96:  }, [onInsert]);
97: 
98:  const handlePairedPress = useCallback((pair: PairedSymbol) => {
99:  setHintType(null);
100:  onInsert(pair.open + pair.close, 1);
101:  }, [onInsert]);
102: 
103:  const handleExercisePress = useCallback((sym: string) => {
104:  setHintType(null);
105:  onInsert(sym + "()", sym.length + 1);
106:  }, [onInsert]);
107: 
108:  const handleExerciseLongPress = useCallback((sym: string) => {
109:  setPopupSymbol(sym);
110:  }, []);
111: 
112:  return (
113:  <View style={[styles.container, { backgroundColor: colors.surfaceContainerLow, height }]}>
114:  <View style={styles.toolbarRow}>
115:   <View style={styles.toolbarFixed}>
116:   <Pressable
117:   onPress={onToggleQwerty}
118:   style={({ pressed }) => [
119:   styles.keyboardIcon,
120:   { backgroundColor: pressed ? derivedColors.primaryContainer : derivedColors.primaryContainer + "33" },
121:   ]}
122:   accessibilityRole="button"
123:   accessibilityLabel="QWERTY keyboard"
124:   >
125:   <MaterialCommunityIcons name="keyboard" size={18} color={derivedColors.primary} />
126:   </Pressable>
127:   <Pressable
128:   onPressIn={startBackspaceRepeat}
129:   onPressOut={clearBackspaceRepeat}
130:   style={({ pressed }) => [
131:   styles.keyboardIcon,
132:   { backgroundColor: pressed ? colors.outlineVariant : colors.surfaceContainer },
133:   ]}
134:   accessibilityRole="button"
135:   accessibilityLabel="Backspace"
136:   >
137:   <MaterialCommunityIcons name="backspace" size={18} color={colors.onSurfaceVariant} />
138:   </Pressable>
139:   <Pressable
140:   onPress={onNewline}
141:   style={({ pressed }) => [
142:   styles.keyboardIcon,
143:   { backgroundColor: pressed ? colors.outlineVariant : colors.surfaceContainer },
144:   ]}
145:   accessibilityRole="button"
146:   accessibilityLabel="New line"
147:   >
148:   <MaterialCommunityIcons name="keyboard-return" size={18} color={colors.onSurfaceVariant} />
149:   </Pressable>
150:   </View>
151:  <ScrollView
152:  horizontal
153:  showsHorizontalScrollIndicator={false}
154:  style={styles.symbolsScroll}
155:  contentContainerStyle={styles.symbolsContent}
156:  >
157:  {pairedSymbols.map((pair) => {
158:  const hinted = pair.hintTrigger && pair.hintTrigger === hintType;
159:  return (
160:  <Pressable
161:  key={pair.display}
162:  onPress={() => handlePairedPress(pair)}
163:  style={({ pressed }) => [
164:  styles.symbolButton,
165:  {
166:  backgroundColor: hinted
167:  ? pressed ? derivedColors.primaryContainer : derivedColors.primaryContainer + "4D"
168:  : pressed ? colors.outlineVariant : colors.surfaceContainer,
169:  },
170:  ]}
171:  accessibilityRole="button"
172:  accessibilityLabel={pair.display}
173:  >
174:  <Text style={[styles.symbolText, { color: hinted ? colors.primary : colors.onSurfaceVariant }]}>
175:  {pair.display}
176:  </Text>
177:  </Pressable>
178: );
179:  })}
180:  {singleSymbols.map((sym) => (
181:  <Pressable
182:  key={sym}
183:  onPress={() => handleSinglePress(sym)}
184:  style={({ pressed }) => [
185:  styles.symbolButton,
186:  { backgroundColor: pressed ? colors.outlineVariant : colors.surfaceContainer },
187:  ]}
188:  accessibilityRole="button"
189:  accessibilityLabel={sym}
190:  >
191:  <Text style={[styles.symbolText, { color: colors.onSurfaceVariant }]}>
192:  {sym}
193:  </Text>
194:  </Pressable>
195: ))}
196:  </ScrollView>
197:  </View>
198: 
199:  {exerciseSymbols.length > 0 && (
200:  <View style={styles.exerciseRow}>
201:  {exerciseSymbols.filter(sym => !p5FunctionLabels.has(sym)).map((sym) => (
202:  <Pressable
203:  key={sym}
204:  onPress={() => handleExercisePress(sym)}
205:  onLongPress={() => handleExerciseLongPress(sym)}
206:  style={({ pressed }) => [
207:  styles.exerciseKey,
208:  { backgroundColor: pressed ? derivedColors.primaryContainer : colors.surfaceContainer },
209:  ]}
210:  accessibilityRole="button"
211:  accessibilityLabel={sym}
212:  >
213:   <Text style={[styles.exerciseKeyText, { color: derivedColors.primary }]}>
214:  {sym}
215:  </Text>
216:  </Pressable>
217: ))}
218:  </View>
219: )}
220: 
221:  <View style={styles.functionsContainer}>
222:  {p5Functions.map((fn) => {
223:  const isDisabled = fn.disabled || usedFunctions.includes(fn.label);
224:  return (
225:  <Pressable
226:  key={fn.label}
227:  onPress={isDisabled ? undefined : () => handleFunctionPress(fn)}
228:  onLongPress={() => setPopupSymbol(fn.label)}
229:  disabled={isDisabled}
230:  style={({ pressed }) => [
231:  styles.functionKey,
232:  {
233:  backgroundColor: isDisabled
234:  ? colors.surfaceContainerHigh
235:  : pressed
236:  ? derivedColors.primaryContainer
237:  : colors.surfaceContainerHigh,

190: function hexToRgb(hex: string): string {
191:   const h = hex.replace("#", "");
192:   const r = parseInt(h.substring(0, 2), 16);
193:   const g = parseInt(h.substring(2, 4), 16);
194:   const b = parseInt(h.substring(4, 6), 16);
195:   return `${r},${g},${b}`;
196: }
197: 
198: function lightenHex(hex: string, factor: number): string {
199:   const h = hex.replace("#", "");
200:   const r = parseInt(h.substring(0, 2), 16);
201:   const g = parseInt(h.substring(2, 4), 16);
202:   const b = parseInt(h.substring(4, 6), 16);
203:   const lr = Math.round(r + (255 - r) * factor);
204:   const lg = Math.round(g + (255 - g) * factor);
205:   const lb = Math.round(b + (255 - b) * factor);
206:   return `#${lr.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")}${lg.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")}${lb.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")}`;
207: }
208: 
209: function darkenHex(hex: string, factor: number): string {
210:   const h = hex.replace("#", "");
211:   const r = parseInt(h.substring(0, 2), 16);
212:   const g = parseInt(h.substring(2, 4), 16);
213:   const b = parseInt(h.substring(4, 6), 16);
214:   const dr = Math.round(r * (1 - factor));
215:   const dg = Math.round(g * (1 - factor));
216:   const db = Math.round(b * (1 - factor));
217:   return `#${dr.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")}${dg.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")}${db.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")}`;
218: }
